zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Sutton 1st Baron Dudley於1400年12月25日出生時，他的父親Sir John Sutton V20歲，母親Constance Blount21歲。他於1420年3月14日與Lady Elizabeth Berkeley在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾杜德利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1455年登記服兵役。他於1473年在英國倫敦被列為constable of the tower of london。他去世於1487年9月30日在英國斯塔福爾斯塔福德享年86歲，埋葬在英國斯塔福爾杜德利。

nameMeanings.name: Sutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Sutton, named with Old English sūth ‘south, southern’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The English surname is also common in Ireland (Wexford, Kildare), where it has been established since the 13th century and Gaelicized as de Sutún.
Jewish (from the former Ottoman Empire, including Syria): unexplained.
English: topographic name from Middle English (bi) suthentune ‘(at the place to the) south of the village’.

variants.name: Setton
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avi, Ronit, Yossef.  French Andree, Henri, Jacques, Maryse.
Jewish (from the Ottoman Empire): altered form of   Sutton  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Sutton 1st Baron Dudley was born on 25 December 1400, his father, Sir John Sutton V, was 20 and his mother, Constance Blount, was 21. He married Lady Elizabeth Berkeley on 14 March 1420, in Dudley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He registered for military service in 1455. In 1473, at the age of 73, his occupation is listed as constable of the tower of london in London, England. He died on 30 September 1487, in Stafford, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 86, and was buried in Dudley, Staffordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Sutton 1st Baron Dudley est né le 25 décembre 1400, son père, Sir John Sutton V, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Constance Blount, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elizabeth Berkeley le 14 mars 1420, à Dudley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1455. En 1473, à l’âge de 73 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est constable of the tower of london à Londres, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 30 septembre 1487, à Stafford, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 86 ans, et a été enterré à Dudley, Staffordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Sutton 1st Baron Dudley am 25. Dezember 1400 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Sutton V 20 und seine Mutter Constance Blount 21. Er hat am 14. März 1420 in Dudley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Lady Elizabeth Berkeley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er hat sich 1455 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1473, als er 73 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als constable of the tower of london in London, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 30. September 1487 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Stafford, Staffordshire, England und wurde in Dudley, Staffordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Sutton 1st Baron Dudley è nato il il 25 dicembre 1400, il suo padre, Sir John Sutton V, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Constance Blount, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Lady Elizabeth Berkeley il 14 marzo 1420, nel Dudley, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1455. Nel 1473, all'età di 73 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come constable of the tower of london nel London, England. Morì il 30 settembre 1487, nel Stafford, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 86 anni, e fu sepolto a Dudley, Staffordshire, England.

ja.St. James Priory, Dudley, Staffordshire,: イギリススタフォードシュアイアダドリー
ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Sutton 1st Baron Dudleyが1400年12月25日に生まれた時，父Sir John Sutton Vは20歳，母Constance Blountは21歳であった。1420年3月14日にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアダドリーでLady Elizabeth Berkeleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1455年に兵役登録をした。1473年，73歳の時，イギリスロンドンでの職業はconstable of the tower of londonと記録されている。彼は1487年9月30日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアスタフォードで86歳で死去し，イギリススタフォードシュアイアダドリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: 영국 미들레세스 웨스트민스터 팔레이스 프 웨스트민스터
ko.Dudley Castle, Worcestershire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 드들리 드들리 카스틀
ko.Aston le Walls, Northamptonshire, Englan: 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 애스턴 일 월스
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Sutton 1st Baron Dudley(이)가 1400년 12월 25일에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Sutton V(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Constance Blount(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1420년 3월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 드들리에서 Lady Elizabeth Berkeley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1455년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1473년, 73세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 런던에서 constable of the tower of london이었다. 그는 1487년 9월 30일 영국 스태퍼드실르 스태퍼드에서 86세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스태퍼드실르 드들리에 묻혔다.

pt.25 December 1400–30 September 1487: 25 de dezembro de 1400–30 de setembro de 1487
pt.1434: de 10 de janeiro de 1434 a 9 de janeiro de 1435
pt.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra
pt.Dudley Castle, Worcestershire, England: Dudley Castle, Dudley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.Aston le Walls, Northamptonshire, Englan: Aston le Walls, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Sutton 1st Baron Dudley nasceu em 25 de dezembro de 1400, seu pai, Sir John Sutton V, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Constance Blount, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Elizabeth Berkeley em 14 de março de 1420, em Dudley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1455. Em 1473, com 73 anos, sua profissão aparece como constable of the tower of london em London, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 30 de setembro de 1487, em Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 86 anos, e foi sepultado em Dudley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: палеис оф вестминстир, вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.Dudley Castle, Worcestershire, England: дудли кастл, дудли, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.Aston le Walls, Northamptonshire, Englan: астон л валлс, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Sutton 1st Baron Dudley родился 25 декабря 1400 г., его отцу по имени Sir John Sutton V было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Constance Blount, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elizabeth Berkeley 14 марта 1420 г. в местности дудли, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. В 1455 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1473 году, в возрасте 73 лет, работал по профессии constable of the tower of london в местности Лондон, Англия. Он умер 30 сентября 1487 г. в местности стаффорд, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 86 лет и был похоронен в местности дудли, стаффордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Sutton 1st Baron Dudley nació el 25 de diciembre de 1400, su papá, Sir John Sutton V, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Constance Blount, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Lady Elizabeth Berkeley el 14 de marzo de 1420, en Dudley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1455. En 1473, a la edad de 73 años, su ocupación registrada era constable of the tower of london en London, Inglaterra. Murió el 30 de septiembre de 1487, en Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 86 años, y fue sepultado en Dudley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.
